title: Monkey Twins
original_title: วานรคู่ฟัด
overview: After a tragic loss of his lover, Nuer goes on a monkey training in order to avenge for her death and to deliver his brand of justice with Li-in, his lover’s younger sister. The Thai action depicts an exquisite and original combination of Muay Thai and Peking opera.
